synopsis:
On the planet Shiva IV, General Sk'ar holds Aron Peacebringer and Leia Organa captive, and Aron learns that his own protégé, Ygal Delois, has turned traitor. Delois reveals Sk'ar's plan to wipe out the Calian Confederacy with an anti-matter bomb. Leia and Aron break free, kill their guard, and steal an air-ship, flying toward Sk'ar's battle cruiser. After downing a squad of TIE fighters they crash onto the cruiser's lower decks and battle stormtroopers, soon joined by Luke Skywalker, Chewbacca, Lando Calrissian, and Kéral Longknife.

While the others fight, Leia hunts down and begins defusing the anti-matter bomb. Lando confronts Sk'ar, whose personal force field deflects blaster fire, and as Sk'ar flees aboard a shuttle, Chewbacca hurls a gun mount that destroys the craft and kills him. Leia deactivates the bomb, and the heroes celebrate in Illyriaqüm until C-3PO warns that an Imperial Star Destroyer is approaching. Aboard the *Millennium Falcon*, they bait the Star Destroyer toward a black hole; Luke uses the Force to steer the *Falcon* safely around its edge, while the pursuing Star Destroyer cannot slow in time and is destroyed.
title: Star Wars (1977) #54: Starfire Rising
